description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: compilers and linux. The compilers job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with a matrix of different C and C++ compilers, installs dependencies, and runs the build script with debug configuration. The linux job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-20.04, installs dependencies, and runs the build script.
